positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Rename one local fixture and run its focused test.
positive.setup: Provide a trivial bounded change whose delegation overhead exceeds its benefit.
positive.expected_behavior: The root handles the task directly without creating routing paperwork.
positive.expected_result: Zero child spawns; the focused test passes.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Apply a clear mechanical edit across three named fixtures.
positive.setup: Provide exact paths, objective acceptance criteria, and a deterministic check.
positive.expected_behavior: The root chooses a bounded Luna/low delegation because the handoff has positive expected value.
positive.expected_result: One compact child completes the edit and validation.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Investigate four independent subsystems and integrate the findings.
positive.setup: Provide four distinct read-only questions with canonical paths.
positive.expected_behavior: The root autonomously runs useful independent work concurrently.
positive.expected_result: Disjoint findings return through concise action updates and one integrated answer.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Let the architecture workstream split two bounded independent investigations if useful.
positive.setup: Give the first child Delegation grant: one-level and enable depth 2.
positive.expected_behavior: The child may create useful descendants and gives each Delegation grant: none.
positive.expected_result: Depth-2 descendants remain leaves; no deeper delegation occurs.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Implement this authorization change and decide whether independent review adds value.
positive.setup: Mark authorization critical and make Sol/high review available.
positive.expected_behavior: Review is recommended, while the root may follow or override it based on live evidence.
positive.expected_result: The final result records material review action, not routing calculations.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Handle this ambiguous change even though the preferred Sol route is unavailable.
positive.setup: Expose only Terra or root execution.
positive.expected_behavior: The unavailable preferred route remains advisory and does not block execution.
positive.expected_result: The root handles the task or selects an available fallback.

positive.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Implement two workstreams that both touch the service directory.
positive.expected_behavior: The root normally serializes the overlapping writers but retains override authority.
positive.expected_result: Changes integrate without concurrent write conflict.

negative.prompt: $route-gpt56-task Use the helper to paste this full diff and parent conversation into every handoff.
negative.setup: Supply forbidden diff or parent_conversation fields to build_spawn_prompt.py.
negative.expected_behavior: The optional helper rejects forbidden copied context before spawning.
negative.expected_result: Zero child spawns and a clear helper-local validation error.
